name: KL Par FC IP Compact
comment: Compact, powerful, and versatile, the KL PAR IP COMPACT delivers exceptional lighting performance in a small, rugged package. Designed for any environment, this IP65-rated LED fixture offers precise color temperature control, full-spectrum rendering, and consistent wash coverage, powered by a highly efficient RGBMA engine that provides up to 5,474 lumens.

capabilities.comment: Random strobe effect - slow to fast
